zh.lifeSummary: 當Renaud de Nevers於1055年出生在法國時，他的父親Guillaume de Nevers27歲，母親Ermengarde Tonnerre31歲。他和Agnes de Beaugency至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1089年8月5日在法國布格奧享年34歲，埋葬在法國布格尼艾福內維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Renaud de Nevers于1055年出生在法国时，他的父亲Guillaume de Nevers27岁，母亲Ermengarde Tonnerre31岁。他和Agnes de Beaugency至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1089年8月5日在法国布格奧享年34岁，埋葬在法国布格尼艾福內維斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Renaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Renaud de Nevers was born in 1055, in France, his father, Guillaume de Nevers, was 27 and his mother, Ermengarde Tonnerre, was 31. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes de Beaugency. He died on 5 August 1089, in Auxerre, Yonne, Burgundy, France, at the age of 34, and was buried in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renaud de Nevers est né en 1055, à France, son père, Guillaume de Nevers, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde Tonnerre, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes de Beaugency. Il est décédé le 5 août 1089, à Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Renaud de Nevers 1055 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Nevers 27 und seine Mutter Ermengarde Tonnerre 31. Er hatte mit Agnes de Beaugency mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. August 1089 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Auxerre, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud de Nevers è nato il nel 1055 nel Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume de Nevers, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde Tonnerre, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes de Beaugency. Morì il 5 agosto 1089, nel Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Renaud de Neversが1055年にフランスで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Neversは27歳，母Ermengarde Tonnerreは31歳であった。彼はAgnes de Beaugencyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1089年8月5日にフランスボウルゴグンイオンアウクセアで34歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Renaud de Nevers(이)가 1055년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Nevers(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde Tonnerre(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Agnes de Beaugency(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1089년 8월 5일 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 오세르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud de Nevers nasceu em 1055, em França, seu pai, Guillaume de Nevers, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde Tonnerre, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes de Beaugency. Ele faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1089, em Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renaud de Nevers родился в 1055 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Nevers было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde Tonnerre, 31. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Agnes de Beaugency. Он умер 5 августа 1089 г. в местности ауксирр, енн, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Renaud de Nevers nació en 1055, en Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Nevers, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ermengarde Tonnerre, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes de Beaugency. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1089, en Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia.
